zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice Wallop於1416年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普時，她的父親Sir John Wallop65歲，母親Alice Bushey46歲。她於1429年與Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年10月29日在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內享年58歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾卡爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice Wallop于1416年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普时，她的父亲Sir John Wallop65岁，母亲Alice Bushey46岁。她于1429年与Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.在英国英格兰維爾爾卡爾內结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年10月29日在英国英格兰維爾爾卡爾內享年58岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾卡爾內。

nameMeanings.name: Wallop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Nether and Over Wallop (Hants).

variants.name: Avis
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice Wallop was born in 1416, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Wallop, was 65 and her mother, Alice Bushey, was 46. She married Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. in 1429, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 29 October 1474, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Calne, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice Wallop est née en 1416, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Wallop, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Alice Bushey, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. en 1429, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 octobre 1474, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avice Wallop 1416 in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Wallop 65 und ihre Mutter Alice Bushey 46. Sie hat 1429 in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Oktober 1474 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Calne, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Wallop è nata il nel 1416 nel Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Wallop, aveva 65 anni e sua madre, Alice Bushey, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. nel 1429, nel Calne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1474, nel Calne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Calne, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice Wallopが1416年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップで生まれた時，父Sir John Wallopは65歳，母Alice Busheyは46歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンでRobert Blake of Quemberford M.P.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年10月29日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンで58歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice Wallop(이)가 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wallop(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Bushey(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 캘니에서 Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 10월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 캘니에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 캘니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Wallop nasceu em 1416, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Wallop, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Alice Bushey, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. em 1429, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1474, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice Wallop родилась в 1416 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Wallop было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Bushey, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. в 1429 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 29 октября 1474 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avice Wallop nació en 1416, en Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Wallop, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Alice Bushey, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. en 1429, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1474, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
